headline: Apple anchored a new AI architecture on Google Gemini models while throughput scaling broke out across the inference stack.
body: Apple revealed a Core AI framework built around Google Gemini models, choosing model integration over proprietary foundation models, with renewed attention on Siri's voice assistant. Throughput scaling surfaced as a new entrant on two fronts: NVIDIA detailed NVFP4 quantization on Blackwell for faster pre-training, and a separate writeup outlined two leaps to 1000 tokens per second on a trillion-parameter model. Frontier agentic work continued with Nex N2 Pro, a 400B model targeting autonomous agent performance. A reported supply-chain compromise of Microsoft to deliver malware to Claude and Gemini users added a security thread.

cited_items.title: Apple reveals new AI architecture built around Google Gemini models
Microsoft Hacked to Deliver Malware to Claude and Gemini Users
Train Models Faster with JAX and MaxText Using NVFP4 on NVIDIA Blackwell
Nex N2 Pro: Frontier agentic performance at 400B
